description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for an Erlang project using rebar3. Define stages lint, dialyzer, eunit, eqc and set variable ERL_LIBS to ./libs. Add a lint job in the lint stage that runs ./rebar3 as lint lint on an erlang-19 runner. Add a dialyzer job in the dialyzer stage that runs ./rebar3 dialyzer on an erlang-19 runner. Add an eunit job in the eunit stage that runs ./rebar3 eunit on an erlang-19 runner. Add three eqc jobs (eqc-bsd, eqc-linux, eqc-smartos) in the eqc stage that each execute: mkdir libs; cd libs; curl -Ol http://www.quviq.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/09/eqcmini-2.01.0.zip; unzip eqcmini-2.01.0.zip; cd ..; epmd &; ./rebar3 as eqc eqc; the eqc-linux job also runs before_script apt-get update and apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends unzip and uses the erlang:20 Docker image, while eqc-bsd and eqc-smartos run on bsd and smartos tags respectively.
